sanskrit: ईश्वरः सर्वभूतानां हृद्देशेऽर्जुन तिष्ठति। भ्रामयन् सर्वभूतानि यन्त्रारूढानि मायया॥
transliteration: īśvaraḥ sarva-bhūtānāṃ hṛd-deśe ’rjuna tiṣṭhati | bhrāmayan sarva-bhūtāni yantrārūḍhāni māyayā ||
literal_meaning: The Supreme Lord, of all beings, in the heart-region, O Arjuna, is seated; causing to wander, all beings, mounted on a machine, by māyā.
contextual_meaning: You are not the sole author of your choices; a deeper intelligence within the heart orchestrates your life story while you ride the ‘vehicle’ of body-mind programmed by past karma. Recognizing this dissolves the burden of omnipotent personal control and invites humble cooperation with an inner guide.
psychological_state: Shift from egocentric locus-of-control to participatory ego-Self relationship; reduction of decision paralysis through acceptance of co-agency.
trigger_scenario: A high-achieving professional collapses with burnout, realizing that meticulous life planning still delivered an unplanned illness; therapy focuses on listening to the heart’s signals rather than forcing outcomes.
anchor_text: Let the quiet wisdom in your heart steer the vehicle of your life.
